summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X67 Digital Media Groupe Romanian classifieds marketplace. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified homepage with dark theme, all 8 categories grid, authentication page with login form and Google OAuth button, create ad page (auth-gated), category listing pages, mobile/tablet responsive design, and PWA manifest configuration.

minor.issue: Health endpoint does not exist (returns 404) - not critical but recommended for monitoring

passed_tests: GET /api/categories - each category has id, name, icon, color, subcategories
GET /api/ads - returns 200 with proper pagination structure
POST /api/auth/login - valid credentials return 200 with user data
GET /api/cities - returns list of Romanian cities
frontend_verified: Homepage loads with dark theme (#050505 background)
All 8 categories displayed in grid: Escorte, Imobiliare, Auto, Locuri de muncă, Electronice, Modă, Servicii, Animale
Auth page shows login form with email/password inputs
Auth page has 'Continuă cu Google' (Google OAuth) button - clickable
Auth page has 'Ai uitat parola?' (Forgot password) link
Login flow works - redirects to homepage with success toast
Create Ad page accessible only when logged in (redirects to /auth if not)
Create Ad page shows 4-step wizard: Categorie, Detalii, Poze, Confirmare
Category listing pages work (Escorts, Real Estate tested)
Category pages have filters: search, subcategory, city, price, sort
Mobile responsive design (390x844) - hamburger menu, single column layout
Tablet responsive design (768x1024) - grid layout adapts
PWA manifest present with correct dark theme colors
PWA install prompt shown on homepage
Footer shows Viva Wallet payment integration
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing admin account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 requested features verified working: 1) Homepage loads with dark theme (#050505), 2) Categories grid displays all 8 categories with images and subcategory counts, 3) Auth page login form works with email/password, 4) Google login button is clickable, 5) Create ad page is auth-gated (redirects to /auth if not logged in), 6) Ad listing pages work for categories (tested escorts, real_estate), 7) No ads exist yet so ad detail page not tested, 8) Mobile responsive design works (hamburger menu, single column), 9) PWA manifest present with dark theme colors and app shortcuts, 10) All API endpoints respond correctly. Cloudinary integration configured for image uploads. Viva Wallet configured for Escorts TopUp payments.
